title: Find My Device - Allow location [Android]
scenario: Find My Device feature requests location permission with Always allow, Allow while using app, and Don't allow options in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a Poly Bluetooth headset connected.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and open the App Menu.
expected: A pop-up window appears requesting location permission with the options: 'Always allow', 'Allow while using app', 'Don't allow'.
